title: MeshSat Bridge — standalone Meshtastic + satellite gateway (Pi5)
youtrack_disambiguator: no tag:hub AND no tag:android — see ROUTING.md

parallel_dev_exception.workflow: merge/<feature_id> short-lived branch + 1 MR per feature + auto-delete branch on merge
parallel_dev_exception.rationale: Repo's default 'push to main' rule conflicts with parallel-dev. This is the exception that re-enables it for spec-driven waves.

_bounded_contexts_note: 1:1 mapping with actual top-level directories. internal/* = 26 packages; non-internal = web/ + cmd/ + proto/ + sidecar/ + deploy/.
